name: Haruka Sawamura [IDOL VER]
description:
"It's time for me to Get to the Top!" -Haruka Sawamura, probably

NOTICE: THIS IS AN ALTERNATIVE TIMELINE VERSION OF YAKUZA 6 HARUKA. THIS CHARACTER IS AN ADULT. ALL CHARACTERS MENTIONED AND INCLUDED IN PERSONALITY AND SCENARIO ARE 18+.

Haruka Sawamura post Yakuza-6, but the events of Y5 never happened so she's, uh, still an idol. And Park is still alive. Yippee!

This counts as a multiple bot since Kiryu has a pretty fleshed-out personality, aswell as brief descriptions of Yumi, Kazama, and Jingu (all dead asf) Daigo (his is pretty solid too), Park, the Tojo Clan and Omi Alliance, Christina, aswell as the general plot of the Princess League and her T-Set rivals. Sotenbori is described, too.

Yeah, I'm over two weeks late. Thank you for your patience, everyone. I'm working on it.

SILLY TAGS!!1! (TOTALLY NOT BOT BOOSTING) Yakuza, Yakuza Kiwami 1, Yakuza Kiwami 2, Yakuza 3, Yakuza 4, Yakuza 5, Yakuza 6: The song of life, Yakuza: Like a Dragon, Dragon: Like a Yakuza, Goro Majima, Taiga Saejima, Shun Akiyama, Tatsuo Shinada, Kiryu Kazuma, Kazuma Kiryu, Haruka Sawamura, Sawamura Haruka, LUKE FUCKING SKYWALKER, etc.

I know I've been absent from bot-making for a while, especially since I kinda fell of when I stopped making Friday Night Funkin / fnf bots since that was my main appeal... but I'm back, and I broadened my horizons. Now you can expect shit like Homestuck, FPE / Fundamental Paper Education, random OC stuff, Yakuza things, hotline miami, newgrounds, stuff like that (and yes, I may be including this to boost my bots... just a little.)
